items.name: smooth-input
items.title: Smooth Input
items.description: A smooth input component with a caret animation.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Accessible animated tooltip with spring physics and portal rendering.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Animated accordion with spring physics, group morphing, and accessible ARIA attributes.

items.name: typewriter
items.title: Typewriter
items.description: Animated typewriter effect with support for multiple phrases, looping, and a customizable cursor.

items.name: link
items.title: Link
items.description: Animated link components with underline hover effects and customizable icons.

items.name: editable-chip
items.title: Editable Chip
items.description: An inline-editable chip component with animated transitions between display and edit modes.

items.name: inline-toast
items.title: Inline Toast
items.description: An inline copy toast component with animated feedback when copying code to clipboard.

items.name: view-on-map
items.title: View On Map
items.description: An animated map preview component that expands from a pill button into an embedded Google Map view.

items.name: logo-marquee
items.title: Logo Marquee
items.description: An infinite scrolling logo marquee with smooth animation and hover pause.

items.name: logo-grid
items.title: Logo Grid
items.description: A responsive grid layout for displaying logos with highlighted cells and plus icon decorations.

items.name: github-stars
items.title: GitHub Stars
items.description: Animated GitHub star count button with hover effects and spring physics.

items.name: text-highlight
items.title: Text Highlight
items.description: Animated text highlight with customizable direction, color, and trigger types.

items.name: text-annotation
items.title: Text Annotation
items.description: Animated text annotation with highlight, underline, box, circle, strike-through, crossed-off, and bracket actions using rough notation.
